name: network-load-balancer
title: OCI Load Balancer — Network Load Balancer
summary: Creates an L4 passthrough NLB (public or private) with hashing-policy backend sets, TCP/UDP/HTTP(S) health checkers, optional static backend registration (IP or instance OCID), and TCP/UDP listeners. Supports transparent source/destination preservation for firewall-appliance insertion.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory freeform tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' freeform tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' freeform tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional freeform tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: compartment_id
module.description: OCID of the compartment for the network load balancer.

module.name: subnet_id
module.description: Subnet OCID for the NLB (single regional subnet).

module.name: is_private
module.description: Whether the NLB is private (no public IP).

module.name: is_preserve_source_destination
module.description: Preserve source/destination IPs through the NLB (transparent mode for firewalls/appliances).

module.name: nsg_ids
module.description: Network security group OCIDs attached to the NLB.

module.name: backend_sets
module.type: map(object({ policy = optional(string, "FIVE_TUPLE") is_preserve_source = optional(bool, true) health_checker = object({ protocol = string port = number url_path = optional(string, "/") return_code = optional(number, 200) interval_ms = optional(number, 10000) timeout_ms = optional(number, 3000) retries = optional(number, 3) }) backends = optional(map(object({ ip_address = optional(string) target_id = optional(string) port = number weight = optional(number, 1) })), {}) }))
module.description: Backend sets keyed by logical name. Hashing policy controls flow distribution (FIVE_TUPLE default).

module.name: listeners
module.type: map(object({ port = number protocol = string default_backend_set_key = string }))
module.description: Listeners keyed by logical name pointing at backend sets.

outputs.name: lb_id
outputs.description: OCID of the network load balancer.

outputs.name: lb_address
outputs.description: First IP address of the NLB.

outputs.name: listener_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical listener name to listener name on the NLB.

outputs.name: backend_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical backend set name to backend set name. Register dynamic backends against these in the consumer root.
